name: Find Animation Opportunities
description: Search a UI for places that don't animate but should — and reject everything that shouldn't. Read-only; proposes motion with exact values, does not implement.

install.cursor: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill find-animation-opportunities -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill find-animation-opportunities -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill find-animation-opportunities -a codex -g -y
